name_cn:
『Burberry Burberry』
🔥🔥Burberry classic underarm bag,😀 now a hot vintage shop favorite, many bloggers and influencers are hunting for it. Even spending thousands on a pre-owned piece feels worth it. Adjustable strap, convertible to handbag or underarm bag. For the flexible girl, add a chain strap to make it a crossbody bag—a truly versatile classic!
Size: 21/5/14cm, 1816
